content_of_post_to_comment: My dear friends, I don’t think I’ll be too active online today. I’m not feeling well, and I still have to work, even though I honestly don’t know how I’m going to manage it. But hey, it’s not the first time. So if I’m a little quiet or slow to reply, just know I’ll get back to you when I’m feeling a bit better. Stay healthy and have a beautiful day. Ren
